top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 8): The data inputs are duplicated five times identically and no actual die-line files or confirmed regulatory copy have been delivered yet — the brief explicitly says these are supplied 'at start' but they're still placeholders. I cannot approve work that begins without finalized, legally-reviewed ingredient/regulatory text, especially for a cosmetics line with EU and US compliance requirements flagged as a BLOCKER in the spec itself.

AGENT CHOKE on 'brand_logo': Vision score of only 6/10 on a white-background logo PNG means the agent's image_crop_to_bounds step will struggle to isolate the mark cleanly against the dark label background (#214E3B), risking a blown-out or misregistered logo composite before the workflow even reaches fill_text.

Completeness 5/10: dieline_spec.json self-declares a workflow blocker yet the data to resolve it (directions/warnings) already exists in ingredients.json — contradiction not reconciled, leaving executor uncertain
Decision Quality 6/10: Blocker note in dieline_spec.json is contradictory — data exists in ingredients.json to resolve it, yet it was not resolved, leaving executor in ambiguous state
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 8.7/10, but package Completeness scored 5 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
